title: ‘Operation Iron Pursuit’ Nets 350 Child Sex Predators
description: Hundreds of child sexual abuse victims were located and over 350 child sex abuse offenders arrested in April as a result of the U.S. Department of Justice’s (DOJ) Operation Iron Pursuit. Officials located over 200 children and 350 child sex predators were arrested during the operation that ran from April 1 until April 30, the [...] The post ‘Operation Iron Pursuit’ Nets 350 Child Sex Predators appeared first on CBNC .

title: Uganda hails US partnership ahead of Freedom 250 celebrations
description: The government of Uganda has praised its long-standing and cordial relationship with the United States as Washington prepares to mark 250 years of independence under the Freedom 250 campaign. On July 4, 2026, the US will commemorate the 250th anniversary of the signing of the Declaration of Independence, a milestone being marked globally through the [...] The post Uganda hails US partnership ahead of Freedom 250 celebrations appeared first on The Observer .

title: Stratos Project unknowns raise environmental concerns
description: The Stratos Project continues to draw scrutiny as researchers and environmental organizations raise concerns about the massive data center’s potential impacts on water resources, air quality, energy consumption and heat generation.

title: Trump to discuss Iran with Xi Jinping during China visit: Officials
description: Official says US president will likely ‘apply pressure’ on China over Beijing’s purchase of Iranian oil amid war. Published On The post Trump to discuss Iran with Xi Jinping during China visit: Officials appeared first on Daily News World News Turkish Turkey .

title: The Only Bones Cold Open The Show's Creator Regrets (For A Reason You'd Never Guess)
description: While the premise of the series made blood and gore pretty much inevitable, Hart Hanson wishes Bones had toned it down just this once.

title: Pa. Gov. Josh Shapiro endorses Bob Harvie’s campaign to oust Brian Fitzpatrick in Bucks County congressional seat
description: Gov. Josh Shapiro has officially thrown his support behind Bucks County Commissioner Bob Harvie’s campaign to unseat U.S. Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick.

title: When survivability trumps superiority
description: Modern Warfare Lessons: Analyzing how Ukraine and Iran prioritize resilience over superiority. Discover why survival is the new decisive strategy in 2026.

title: Fabio Wardley releases first statement after brutal Daniel Dubois defeat
description: Fabio Wardley lost his WBO world title to Daniel Dubois in Manchester this weekend in an instant heavyweight classic. Wardley showed incredible heart in the first defeat of his career, shipping extreme punishment at the heavy hands of Dubois before being stopped by the referee in the penultimate round. title: De La Cruz and Steer help the Reds back Abbott in a 5-0 win over the Astros
